pages.text: The heart of a $(l:creatures/demon)Demon$(/l) is a powerful and entirely evil thing; It is the main ingredient when creating an $(l:kettle/infernal_infusion)Infernal Infusion$(/l).

pages.title: Obtaining Demon Hearts
pages.text: A Demon Heart can be acquired either by bargaining with a Demon or by killing one.$(br)To maximize the chances of a Demon dropping a heart when it dies, the killing blow should be inflicted with an $(l:artifacts/weapons/arthana)Arthana$(/l).

pages.title: Eating Demon Hearts
pages.text: Eating a Demon Heart will grant the powers of a Demon. Beware however that the human form is not designed to hold such power, nor cope with the constant $(item)Hunger$() that demons possess. Be especially cautious when the effects wear off!

pages.title: Placing the Heart
pages.text: A Demon Heart can also be placed in the world by sneak right-clicking on a block. A placed Heart can provide $(l:altar/altar#power)Power$(/l) to an $(l:altar/altar)Altar$(/l) and can also influence $(l:dimensions/spirit_world#worse_nightmares)Dreaming$(/l)
